info.name: Inter Fonts
info.summary: Replaces all Nextcloud interface fonts with the Inter typeface
info.description:
# Inter Fonts
Switches every font in the Nextcloud interface to **Inter**, a highly-legible typeface designed specifically for computer screens by Rasmus Andersson.
- Zero external requests — the Inter variable font is fully self-hosted inside this app - Covers all weights (100–900) from a single WOFF2 variable-font file per axis - Works correctly in sub-directory installs via runtime URL generation - Works across the entire Nextcloud UI: navigation, file lists, modals, settings, and more - Overrides the Nextcloud CSS font variable for deep integration
The font is licensed under the [SIL Open Font License 1.1](https://scripts.sil.org/OFL).
info.author: solracsf
